zh.Picquigny, Somme, Hauts-de-France, Franç: 法國豪-德-福朗斯索姆皮易尼
zh.lifeSummary: 當Alix DE PICQUIGNY於1200年出生在法國豪-德-福朗斯索姆皮易尼時，她的父親Enguerrand de Picquigny II29歲，母親Marguerite de Ponthieu27歲。她於1221年與Philippe DE CREQUY在法國豪-德-福朗斯索姆皮易尼結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1264年在法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯福雷辛享年64歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alix DE PICQUIGNY于1200年出生在法国豪-德-福朗斯索姆皮易尼时，她的父亲Enguerrand de Picquigny II29岁，母亲Marguerite de Ponthieu27岁。她于1221年与Philippe DE CREQUY在法国豪-德-福朗斯索姆皮易尼结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1264年在法国豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯福雷辛享年64岁。

nameMeanings.name: DE
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Alix
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of   Alex  , used only as a feminine name. Its formation has probably been influenced by   Alice .

en.lifeSummary: When Alix DE PICQUIGNY was born in 1200, in Picquigny, Somme, Hauts-de-France, France, her father, Enguerrand de Picquigny II, was 29 and her mother, Marguerite de Ponthieu, was 27. She married Philippe DE CREQUY in 1221, in Picquigny, Somme, Hauts-de-France, France. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1264, in Fressin, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, at the age of 64.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alix DE PICQUIGNY est née en 1200, à Picquigny, Somme, Hauts-de-France, France, son père, Enguerrand de Picquigny II, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Marguerite de Ponthieu, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Philippe DE CREQUY en 1221, à Picquigny, Somme, Hauts-de-France, France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1264, à Fressin, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, à l’âge de 64 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alix DE PICQUIGNY 1200 in Picquigny, Somme, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Enguerrand de Picquigny II 29 und ihre Mutter Marguerite de Ponthieu 27. Sie hat 1221 in Picquigny, Somme, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich Philippe DE CREQUY geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1264 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Fressin, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alix DE PICQUIGNY è nata il nel 1200 nel Picquigny, Somme, Hauts-de-France, Francia, sua padre, Enguerrand de Picquigny II, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Marguerite de Ponthieu, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Philippe DE CREQUY nel 1221, nel Picquigny, Somme, Hauts-de-France, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1264, nel Fressin, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, all'età di 64 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alix DE PICQUIGNYが1200年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスソンメピククイグニーで生まれた時，父Enguerrand de Picquigny IIは29歳，母Marguerite de Ponthieuは27歳であった。1221年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスソンメピククイグニーでPhilippe DE CREQUYと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1264年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスプアス-デ-カレイスフレシンで64歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alix DE PICQUIGNY(이)가 1200년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 솜 피c키그니에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Enguerrand de Picquigny II(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Marguerite de Ponthieu(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1221년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 솜 피c키그니에서 Philippe DE CREQUY(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1264년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 파스-데-캘레이 프레신에서 64세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alix DE PICQUIGNY nasceu em 1200, em Picquigny, Somme, Hauts-de-France, França, seu pai, Enguerrand de Picquigny II, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Marguerite de Ponthieu, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Philippe DE CREQUY em 1221, em Picquigny, Somme, Hauts-de-France, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1264, em Fressin, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, França, com 64 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alix DE PICQUIGNY родилась в 1200 г. в местности пиккуигни, сомм, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция, её отцу по имени Enguerrand de Picquigny II было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Marguerite de Ponthieu, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Philippe DE CREQUY в 1221 г. в местности пиккуигни, сомм, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1264 г. в местности фрессин, пас-де-калеи, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция в возрасте 64 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alix DE PICQUIGNY nació en 1200, en Picquigny, Somme, Hauts-de-France, Francia, su papá, Enguerrand de Picquigny II, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Marguerite de Ponthieu, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Philippe DE CREQUY en 1221, en Picquigny, Somme, Hauts-de-France, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1264, en Fressin, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, a la edad de 64 años.
